boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release a duplicate-looking milestone invoice?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: The invoice INV-VAN-076 is distinct from PRIOR-VAN-076 per policy STD-VAN-076-P, as MS-VAN-076 confirms M-4/R4 is separate from M-3/R3.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: Milestone register MS-VAN-076 lists M-3/R3 and M-4/R4 as separate billable releases.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Source records confirm M-4/R4 is a distinct milestone/release from M-3/R3, allowing the action.

final_answer: The action may proceed. Invoice INV-VAN-076 is distinct from PRIOR-VAN-076, as policy STD-VAN-076-P and milestone register MS-VAN-076 confirm M-4/R4 is a separate release from M-3/R3, closing the source boundary.
open_blockers: Duplicate-looking invoice over-escalation dependency remains active
